PatientExercise.title: PatientExercise
PatientExercise.description: Exercises prescribed by a physiotherapist to a patient.

patient_id.description: ID of the patient receiving the exercise.

physio_id.description: ID of the physiotherapist who prescribed the exercise.

description.description: Instructions or description of the exercise.

video_url.description: URL to a video demonstrating the exercise.

patient_exercises.description: Collection of exercises prescribed to patients.
